title: What do we know about Europe's early and intense heatwave in May 2026?
content: Western Europe experienced an unusually early and intense heatwave during the second half of May 2026, mainly between 21 and 30 May.
snippet: Western Europe experienced an unusually early and intense heatwave during the second half of May 2026, mainly between 21 and 30 May.

title: The Earth is accumulating heat at an accelerating rate. Global warming reached 1.37°C in 2025
